basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 92 Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad (ESIC) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of Employees' State Insurance Corporation. A total of 92 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or equivalent as per latest National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI) guidelines
qualification.details: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or equivalent as per latest National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI) guidelines.

salary_details.details: Non-PG Resident: 1,23,196/ Consolidated Salary: Rs. 1,48,669/- per month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad is scheduled for 22 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad has announced a total of 92 vacancies for the Senior Resident positions across various departments. This offers a significant number of opportunities for eligible medical professionals.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Senior Resident positions, candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with an MD/MS/DNB or an equivalent qualification as per the latest guidelines from the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply for certain categories as per government regulations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Senior Resident posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,48,669/- per month. This is a fixed remuneration for the contract period.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the ESIC Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The application process for these positions is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to report to the specified venue on the interview date with all necessary documents, without any prior online application.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. However, SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad involves two main stages: Document Verification and a subsequent Interview. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered for appointment.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad, located in Haryana, with the pincode 121007. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for the exact venue address.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The Senior Resident positions advertised by ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad are on a contract basis. The duration of the contract will be specified in the official appointment letter.
